"use client";

import { createAgentFrameSpinner } from "@/lib/next-spinners/agent-frame-spinner";

const FRAMES = [
  "🕛",
  "🕐",
  "🕑",
  "🕒",
  "🕓",
  "🕔",
  "🕕",
  "🕖",
  "🕗",
  "🕘",
  "🕙",
  "🕚",
] as const;

export const ClockSpinner = createAgentFrameSpinner(FRAMES, 100, "ClockSpinner");
